change_class: ADDITIVE KEYS — two new top-level scalars, no existing field changed
change_note: Adds funding_venue_count (=7, single-derived from src/lib/funding-venues.ts FUNDING_VENUE_COUNT = |FUNDING_VENUE_META|) so landing copy can live-bind the funding-arb venue count exactly like exchange_count. Supersedes api-performance-public-shape-snapshot-2026-06-22.json (one-snapshot-per-endpoint). ALSO records _algovault (the additive machine-readable conversion CTA added by OPS-PUBLIC-API-CONVERT-NUDGE-W1 / commit 9bee7de, which left the endpoint snapshot stale) so the drift-check reflects reality. All pre-existing fields are BYTE-UNCHANGED; funding_venue_count is a count-only public scalar — NO outcome_* / internal fields.
source: origin/main src/index.ts /api/performance-public builder (res.json) + src/lib/funding-venues.ts SoT; pre-deploy capture
error_contract: Unchanged. Fail-open per-venue detector (byExchange degrades to empty, never 5xx). funding_venue_count is a compile-time constant (|FUNDING_VENUE_META|) — it cannot fail at request time.
cache_contract: Unchanged (bucket-keyed rolling aggregate). funding_venue_count is a constant folded into the cached body.
consumers: scripts/snapshot-landing-data.mjs (deploy-time injector: dtrf-funding-venue-count + jsonld venue-count rows)
drift_check_command: curl -s https://algovault.com/api/performance-public | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ALLOW=['_algovault','asset_count','byAsset','byCallType','byExchange','byTier','byTimeframe','exchange_count','funding_venue_count','hold_rate','holdsByTier','methodology','overall','period','recentSignals','shadow_venue_count','timeframe_count','totalCalls','totalHolds']; assert sorted(d.keys())==ALLOW, 'TOP-KEY DRIFT: '+str(sorted(d.keys())); blob=json.dumps(d); assert all(k not in blob for k in ['outcome_return_pct','outcome_price','outcome_won','pfe_return_pct','mae_return_pct']), 'FORBIDDEN KEY LEAK'; assert d['funding_venue_count']==7, 'FUNDING COUNT DRIFT: '+str(d.get('funding_venue_count')); print('shape OK, exchange_count', d['exchange_count'], 'funding_venue_count', d['funding_venue_count'])"

anchors_at_capture.note: funding_venue_count == |FUNDING_VENUE_META| (7, Bitget excluded until it exposes nextFundingTime). A KEY-set change, a forbidden-key leak, or funding_venue_count != 7 is the drift signal.
